# Real-world-ish: net/http API server missing server timeouts (PERF-101)
lang: go
file: cmd/api/main.go
---
package main

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// Production-shaped service entrypoint (not package sample).
func main() {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/healthz", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
		_, _ = w.Write([]byte("ok"))
	})
	mux.HandleFunc("/v1/items", listItems)

	// Vulnerable: no Read/Write/Idle timeouts — Slowloris risk.
	srv := &http.Server{
		Addr:    ":8080",
		Handler: mux,
	}
	log.Fatal(srv.ListenAndServe())
}

func listItems(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	// pretend work
	time.Sleep(10 * time.Millisecond)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`[]`))
}
